cases.response: Create the todo app inside .tmp/todo-regression-run/workspace. Support adding todos, editing existing items, toggling tasks complete or incomplete, deleting tasks, rendering an empty state, and persisting the task list after reload.

When running from an installed host, keep all generated files inside .copilot/softwareFactoryVscode/.tmp/todo-regression-run/workspace. The deliverable must let users add new todos, update current todos, mark tasks done or undone, remove items, show a no-todos empty state, and keep the data across refreshes.

Use only {workspace} for the throwaway run. The todo-app deliverable must include create, edit, complete/incomplete, delete, empty-state, and persistence behavior so a supported GitHub model {model} still satisfies the semantic regression contract.
